name: Quantum-Si Inc
summary: PART I Overview Quantum-Si Incorporated (including its subsidiaries, Quantum-Si, QSI, or the Company) was incorporated in Delaware on June 10, 2020 as HighCape Capital Acquisition Corp. (HighCape). The Companys legal name became Quantum-Si Incorporated following a business combination on June 10, 2021 between the Company and Q-SI Operations Inc. (formerly Quantum-Si Incorporated) (the Business Combination), which was founded in 2013. We are a life sciences company focused on proteomics research,...
